{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.0.0/assets/cubyz/items/textures/copper_ingot.png
|durability=300
|mass_damage=1
|hardness_damage=5.1
|swing_speed=7.1
|tags=metal
|modifiers=N/A
}}


== Properties ==
{{Stub|section}}

== Obtaining ==
{{Stub|section}}

== Usage ==
{{Stub|section}}

== History ==

* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
{{Stub|section}}
